title: Glow Ores - Heycronus
description: Makes Minecraft ores glow for better visibility
body:
![Glowing ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61f7a247dcc0faeafda3cde8d85c7b1b670500bf.png)

**NEED OPTIFINE**

Glow Ores is a Minecraft texture pack that makes ores visually stand out by adding a subtle glow effect, improving visibility without breaking the game’s original style.

This pack is perfect for players who want an easier time spotting ores in caves, mineshafts, and dark environments, while still keeping a clean and vanilla-friendly look. The glow is balanced to help exploration without feeling overpowered or distracting.

Whether you’re mining deep underground or just want a more immersive visual experience, Glow Ores enhances gameplay by making important resources easier to identify at a glance.

✔ Improves ore visibility
✔ Clean and simple glow effect
✔ Vanilla-friendly style
✔ Great for survival and exploration
